description: First appeared operating as an 'Acquisitions Consultant' for arms industry magnates, Mr. Muhlik quickly worked his way on to many Most Wanted lists worldwide. Unconfirmed reports suggest he is the last surviving heir to a recently-deposed Middle Eastern monarch. With evidence of elite military training, international private education, and numerous international bank accounts, it's suspected Mr. Muhlik is maneuvering to rebuild sovereign power over his family's historical lands. Pressure and time.

localized_names.english: The Elite Mr. Muhlik | Elite Crew

name: The Elite Mr. Muhlik | Elite Crew
